# github-loop-runner-skill

This repository contains one portable agent skill: `github-loop-runner`.

Purpose: bootstrap or continue GitHub-only autonomous development loops. Use it when a user wants runner docs, `docs/progress.md`, a plan, CI scaffolding, GitHub operation state, loop trace, feedback log, hypothesis log, harness repair protocol, review renewal, and stopper policy.

Supported usage:

- Codex: native local skill under `~/.codex/skills`.
- Other instruction-aware agents: portable Markdown instruction/playbook.

Invoke:

```text
Use $github-loop-runner to turn this product idea into a GitHub repo with autonomous runner docs, progress tracking, GitHub operation ledger, loop trace, feedback log, hypothesis log, harness repair protocol, and milestone PR loops.
```

Portable invocation:

```text
Use the GitHub Loop Runner skill at skills/github-loop-runner/SKILL.md.
If bootstrapping a repo, also load skills/github-loop-runner/references/repo-scaffold.md.
If producing the final runner prompt, also load skills/github-loop-runner/references/runner-prompt.md and skills/github-loop-runner/references/long-run-planning-addendum.md when Long-Run Growth Mode is enabled.
If enforcing GitHub write safety, also load skills/github-loop-runner/references/github-operation-ledger.md.
If enabling structured feedback, also load skills/github-loop-runner/references/feedback-taxonomy.md.
If enabling observability, also load skills/github-loop-runner/references/loop-trace.md.
If enabling renewal and repair, also load skills/github-loop-runner/references/review-and-renewal-loop.md, skills/github-loop-runner/references/harness-repair-loop.md, skills/github-loop-runner/references/loop-hypotheses.md, skills/github-loop-runner/references/loop-review-template.md, and skills/github-loop-runner/references/stopper-policy.md.
```

Important files:

- `skills/github-loop-runner/SKILL.md`: core GitHub-only workflow.
- `skills/github-loop-runner/references/repo-scaffold.md`: generated repository templates.
- `skills/github-loop-runner/references/runner-prompt.md`: copy-paste runner prompt.
- `skills/github-loop-runner/references/long-run-planning-addendum.md`: addendum for long-running external-agent prompts.
- `skills/github-loop-runner/references/github-operation-ledger.md`: GitHub write-operation state and branch/ref safety.
- `skills/github-loop-runner/references/feedback-taxonomy.md`: feedback types, root-cause layers, allowed actions, and forbidden actions.
- `skills/github-loop-runner/references/loop-trace.md`: loop trace event format and metrics.
- `skills/github-loop-runner/references/review-and-renewal-loop.md`: review and renewal rules.
- `skills/github-loop-runner/references/harness-repair-loop.md`: harness repair protocol.
- `skills/github-loop-runner/references/loop-hypotheses.md`: hypothesis log rules.
- `skills/github-loop-runner/references/loop-review-template.md`: review output template.
- `skills/github-loop-runner/references/stopper-policy.md`: hard and soft stoppers.
- `scripts/validate_skill.py`: stable v1 skill/manifest validator.

Integrity rule: the runner must re-read `docs/progress.md` after each completed milestone, declare GitHub operation state before write actions, use CI for verification in GitHub-only mode, update loop trace and feedback log when evidence changes, gate process changes through the hypothesis log, and run the harness repair protocol when repeated runner defects appear.
